headline: 暑期档热度不减，新片蓄势待发
headlineEn: Summer Box Office Heats Up, New Films Ready to Launch
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：无新片上映，本周有两部新片。热门话题包括《惊声尖笑6》《奥德赛》《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: no new releases today, two new movies this week. Trending topics include Scary Movie 6, The Odyssey, Spider-Man: Freshman Year, and more.

industryHighlights.en: Backrooms series continues to gain popularity

industryHighlights.text: 《权力的游戏前传：龙族》新季筹备中
industryHighlights.en: House of the Dragon new season in development
